name: dump_replay_syscollector_delta
description: Replay a recorded syscollector delta session captured from a real debian10 agent. 1447 DataValues across 9 wazuh-states-inventory-* indices (groups, hardware, interfaces, networks, ports, processes, protocols, services, users). Per-item index is preserved — exercises the multi-index Start + DataBatch path end-to-end against the manager. Single agent, single pass.
